ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02894Department of Human Service Studies records23-24-2894Compiled by J. ParkerDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Department of Human Service Studies records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Human Service Studies
New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Community Service Education
New York State College of Home Economics. Department of Home Economics Education
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Policy Analysis and Management
23-24-2894
3.4 cubic feet. 3.4 cubic feet.
1976-1997. Correspondence, reports, pamphlets, minutes, directories, handbooks, newsletters, photographs. Records of the Department of Human Service Studies, now the Department of Policy Analysis and Management. Collection material in English 2904374
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
J. Parker
Date completed:
September 2001
EAD encoding:
J.M. Nicholas, September 2003
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, July 2018
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
1946 the Department of Home Economics Education was established. In 1969 the name was changed to Community Service Education and in 1978 the name was changed again to Human Service Studies. In 1997 the department merged with the Department of Consumer Economics and Housing to become the Department of Policy Analysis and Management.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Five Year Review material and Curriculum Committee minutes; also Department memos and correspondence, faculty meeting minutes, manuals, reports, and budget material.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Five-Year Review, graduate level
Series II. Committees
Series III. Department Memos and Correspondence
Series IV. Faculty Meeting Minutes
Series V. Department Publications and Reports
Series VI. Photographs and Tape Recording
Cite As:
Department of Human Service Studies records, #23-24-2894. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
See also Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records #23-23-2864
See also Department of Policy Analysis and Management records #23-26-3006
Photographs. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
